author: Claude Code
content:
Found additional bug: the case patterns in both hooks used `*/.project/*` which requires a `/` before `.project` — so relative paths like `.project/issues/...` didn't match the allowlist. This caused the chicken-and-egg problem where creating `issue.json` was blocked by the hook that checks for in-progress issues.

Fixed both hooks to also match relative paths:
- `require-issue.sh`: added `.project/*` and `.claude/*` patterns
- `require-docs.sh`: added `.project/issues/*/issue.json` relative pattern

Synced to `.claude/hooks/`.
